name: Target Direction Tuning Curve (synthetic)
short_description: Synthetic cosine-raised-to-power direction tuning curve sampled at 12 angles with 20 noisy trials per angle, used as the canonical optimisation target for every later tuning-curve fit in this project.
size_description: 12 angles (30 deg spacing) with 20 synthetic noisy trials per angle = 12 mean rates and 240 per-trial rates.

files.description: Mean firing rate per direction, one row per sampled angle (columns: angle_deg, mean_rate_hz).
Per-trial firing rates, one row per (angle, trial) with Gaussian noise (sd=3 Hz) added and clipped to >= 0 Hz (columns: angle_deg, trial_index, rate_hz).
Explicit generator parameters used to produce the curve: theta_pref_deg, r_base_hz, r_peak_hz, n, n_angles, n_trials, noise_sd_hz, random_seed.

generator_params.functional_form: r(theta) = r_base + (r_peak - r_base) * ((1 + cos(theta - theta_pref)) / 2) ** n
